name: menus: Show Sidebar (Ctrl-Cmd-0) reveals the sidebar outline view
comment: showSidebar defaults false, so the split pane starts collapsed and sidebarOutline is ABSENT from the AX tree (verified). Ctrl-Cmd-0 expands it -> the outline appears. NOTE: collapsing again does NOT remove the outline from the AX tree (NSSplitViewItem keeps the collapsed pane's view mounted), so only the reveal direction is assertable here; the hide is left to a manual/visual check. Menu-item checkmarks are not exposed in AX, so we assert on the outline's appearance, the directly observable effect.
